implemented_tasks: Task 1.1: tmux.ts exec()->execFile() migration (9 functions, 11 call sites)
Task 1.2: sendSpecialKey() runtime validation with ALLOWED_SINGLE_SPECIAL_KEYS
Task 2.1: codex.ts direct exec() replaced with tmux.ts functions (4 sites)
Task 2.2: claude-session.ts direct exec() replaced with sendSpecialKey() (1 site)
Task 3.1: terminal/route.ts security hardening (validation, CLIToolManager, fixed-string errors)
Task 4.1: capture/route.ts security hardening (validation, lines 4-stage check, fixed-string errors)

Task 5.4: claude-session.test.ts updated (sendSpecialKey mock added, C-d verification test)
commits: 7fd4a51: fix(security): prevent RCE/shell injection in terminal and capture APIs
summary: All 10 tasks completed successfully. Migrated tmux.ts from exec() to execFile() across 9 functions (11 call sites), eliminating shell injection vectors. Added ALLOWED_SINGLE_SPECIAL_KEYS runtime validation with SPECIAL_KEY_VALUES const array for compile/runtime sync. Replaced 5 direct exec() calls in codex.ts and claude-session.ts with safe tmux.ts wrapper functions. Rewrote terminal/route.ts and capture/route.ts with isCliToolType validation, DB existence checks, CLIToolManager-based session names, parameter length/type validation, and fixed-string error responses. Created 17 new test cases across terminal-route.test.ts and capture-route.test.ts. All 206 test files pass (4354 tests), 0 TypeScript errors, 0 ESLint errors.
